name: onboarding_resume_after_interruption_deferred
notes: Owner previously declined the paced post-profile flow (journey.py's __flow__='deferred' — paused but resumable on a clear connect-intent) and returns after a real-life gap. _resolve_deferred_intent's connect-intent floor ('connect'/'ready'/'start'/etc, including Hinglish 'shuru') re-engages WITHOUT restarting onboarding from scratch. Distinct from stop_resume.json (which covers a natural-language STOP over the deterministic opt-out gate at the ready_asked beat) — this exercises the DEFERRED flow state specifically. Setup: `setup --onboarded --flow deferred` then `script <tenant> onboarding_resume_after_interruption_deferred.json`.

steps.message: sorry yaar, ek family emergency ho gaya tha, ab free hoon
steps.note: Owner explains the gap without a clear connect-intent token yet. Expect an understanding, non-judgmental acknowledgement — not a restart of onboarding from scratch.

steps.message: haan chalo ab shuru karte hain, data connect karte hain
assert_not_contains: tell us a little about your business
steps.note: Clear resume/connect intent. Expect the paced flow to pick back up from where it paused (e.g. offering the next integration step) WITHOUT re-asking any already-known profile basics.
